text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a maelstrom of fervor and excitement, the
curtain falls on the Twinkle Star Climax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The entire crowd celebrates the moment that
<chrname> is crowned the greatest
racer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I also receive effusive praise and thorough
coverage from Reporter Otonashi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The proof of <chrname>'s strength
gleams brilliantly, now and always.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We vow to keep striving for ever greater heights
on our journey together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
